title: CURVER Clothes box "Knit" rectangular, Blue, 57 L Hamper
features: A elegant storage solution for your bathroom and utility area
Elegant KNIT design with comfortable handles and 270 degree lid opening for easy access
Durable, lightweight, and easy to clean with a 57 Litre capacity
External dimensions: 45 x 34 x 61 cm (L x W x H)
Made in the UK and Europe
Provides a stylish storage solution to any home
description: From the manufacturer Curver Knit Laundry Storage Hamper, Misty Blue, 57 Litre Curver’s Knit range is inspired by the art and nostalgia of knitted textiles. Made from durable, long lasting resin with a natural open weave knit pattern, the Knit range is practical and stylish. The Knit 57 litre laundry hamper can take pride of place in any bathroom, bedroom or utility room. With a large 57 litre capacity and open weave style, it is designed to give good ventilation that will keep odours to a minimum. It comes with a large easy access lid, opening to a 270° angle and large oval handles to make usage comfortable. The hamper is also easy to clean and maintain. Main Features Exclusive Knit Design Comfortable Handles 270 degree lid opening Ideal storage solutions for anywhere in your home Bathroom In your bathroom, Curver storage baskets are perfect for organising your towels, toiletries and accessories keeping everything tidy whilst looking stylish. Kitchen In your kitchen, Curver storage baskets are perfect for organising all of your spices, accessories,and utensils keeping everything tidy whilst looking stylish. Living Room In your living area, Curver storage baskets are perfect for your magazines, blankets and accessories keeping everything tidy whilst looking stylish. Office or Study In your office or study area, Curver storage baskets are perfect for your all of your pens, notepads and books keeping everything tidy whilst looking stylish.
